intro: The Sophronitis × adrienne, also known as the Adrienne's Sophronitis, is a hybrid species of orchid. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Sophronitis × adrienne include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are tinctures and infusions, which are used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
